ctb_monitoring_issue.problem: CTB auto-update script produces continuous false positives
ctb_monitoring_issue.cause: Script checks local Phase2 services (3009/3010/3011) instead of Vercel endpoints
ctb_monitoring_issue.evidence: 03:30 cycle: script reported 'vercel=OK' and overwrote critical status file despite all endpoints returning HTTP 404
ctb_monitoring_issue.impact: Critical status masked by false positive cycles, recovery could be delayed

action_required: 1. Check Vercel dashboard (https://vercel.com/kyeongtae-na/fms-portal), 2. Review deployments & build logs, 3. Redeploy or rollback, 4. Confirm HTTP 200 on all endpoints
